next_steps: Urgent continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT) for severe acute kidney injury and electrolyte abnormalities
Comprehensive respiratory viral panel and sputum/blood cultures
Autoimmune serology (ANA, Myositis panel including anti-Jo-1)
Review history for potential exposures (e.g., environmental water sources, zoonotic contacts)
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics (covering Legionella and typical community-acquired pneumonia)
Urgent nephrology and infectious disease consultations

differential_diagnoses: Severe community-acquired MRSA pneumonia with rhabdomyolysis
Influenza-associated pneumonia with secondary bacterial infection
Antisynthetase syndrome (or other inflammatory myopathy) with secondary aspiration pneumonia
next_steps: Urine Legionella antigen testing and specialized sputum culture for Legionella
Urgent initiation of continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT) for severe AKI and hyperkalemia
Blood and sputum cultures including fungal and atypical bacterial media
Urinalysis for myoglobin and microscopic examination
Serum myositis panel (including Jo-1, PL-7, PL-12) and creatinine kinase fractionation
Echocardiogram to screen for cardiomyopathy given family history
Continued broad-spectrum antimicrobial therapy covering MRSA and atypical pathogens
Formal infectious disease and nephrology consultation
